allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no na@192.168.99.105 "echo 'SSH Connection Successful!' && uname -a && whoami")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 na@192.168.99.105 "echo '✓ SSH Connection Successful!' && whoami && pwd && echo '' && echo 'System Info:' && uname -a")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 na@192.168.99.105 "ls -lah /share/Container/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'comnakrub|^d|^total' || echo 'Checking directory...'")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && ls -lah && echo '' && echo 'Docker Containers:' && docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docker not available'")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose down && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose ps")
Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E '8765|8766' || ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E '8765|8766' || echo 'Could not check ports'")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && APP_PORT=8765 /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose up -d --force-recreate && sleep 2 && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose ps")
Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "lsof -i :8765 2>/dev/null || fuser 8765/tcp 2>/dev/null || echo 'Cannot determine process'")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker system prune -f && sleep 2 && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker network prune -f")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && APP_PORT=9999 /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose up -d && sleep 2 && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose ps")

Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && APP_PORT=8765 /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose up -d && sleep 2 && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker compose ps")
Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && docker exec comnakrub-backend sh -c 'cd /app && npm run db:generate'")
Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "cd /share/Container/comnakrub && /share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker exec comnakrub-backend sh -c 'cd /app && npm run db:migrate'")
Bash(ssh na@192.168.99.105 "/share/CACHEDEV1_DATA/.qpkg/container-station/usr/bin/.libs/docker exec comnakrub-backend sh -c 'cd /app && npm run db:seed'")
